pi_items.source: Web search confirmed MRI Stack is a standard built-in sample in Fiji/ImageJ containing MRI slices through a human head (528K)
Task description states 'Define at least 3 distinct Regions of Interest (ROIs)' and verifier.py line 68 checks rows >= 3
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 8-9 (DATA_DIR and RESULTS_DIR definitions) and export_result.sh line 12
Verifier.py line 110 checks if variance > 0.5 for scoring points; metadata claims 1.0 as minimum but actual threshold in verifier is 0.5

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the MRI Stack, a legitimate built-in sample image in Fiji containing MRI slices through a human head. The task requires measurement of at least 3 distinct tissue regions (White Matter, Gray Matter, CSF) using texture metrics including Mean Intensity, Standard Deviation, and additional metrics. Results are saved to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/texture_analysis.csv. The verifier checks that standard deviation variance across regions exceeds 0.5 (not 1.0 as metadata claims) to ensure different tissues exhibit distinct texture properties.
